quote: Aman brings clarity to ambiguous problems. He'll show up with three sharpened options and the reasoning behind each — a rare combination of taste and rigor.
author: Priya Rao

quote: Working with Aman raised the bar for our whole team. He treats design systems as a product and ships them with the same discipline.
author: Anirudh Sethi

quote: He asks the questions no one else is asking. That's the signal of a senior designer.
author: Meera Kapoor
